title: Resolve vacuum-current condition: SR1: Sigma/R zero-net branch
description: Sector: Sigma_V / R_V. Allowed condition: Sigma_0 - R_0 = 0 only as a role-level neutrality target until operators, strengths, signs, and domains are derived. Forbidden condition: zero-net is declared to hold without source and relaxation operators. Consequence: zero-net exchange is promising but not a theorem here..
